title: Power button
drDigitalIntro: Your power button is what turns your laptop on. On many laptops it can also log you in with a fingerprint sensor, so you don't have to type your password every time. It's usually the blank square key in the top right corner of your keyboard.
drDigitalSuccess: That's the power button! One of the most important buttons on the whole laptop.
drDigitalHint: Find the power button on your own laptop, then click Continue when you're ready.
